title: AD/ELENA deceleration-ladder relativistic kinematics (GeV → keV)
verify_form: hexa verify --expr <fn> <n> <v>  (hexa-native, mini host, POOL_DISABLE=1; NOT LLM self-judgement, @D g5)

constant.source: CODATA proton rest energy m_p c^2 = 938.272 MeV

ladder_rungs.verdict_verbatim:
verify --expr rel_kinetic_from_p(3500.0)=2685.31
  calc   = 2685.31  ≈ expected 2685.31  (|Δ|=0.0 ≤ ε=1e-9)
  tier   = 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (hexa-native libm-class recompute, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)

verify --expr rel_kinetic_from_p(100.0)=5.3139
  calc   = 5.3139  ≈ expected 5.3139  (|Δ|=0.0 ≤ ε=1e-9)
  tier   = 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (hexa-native libm-class recompute, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)

verify --expr rel_p_from_kinetic(0.1)=13.6991
  calc   = 13.6991  ≈ expected 13.6991  (|Δ|=0.0 ≤ ε=1e-9)
  tier   = 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (hexa-native libm-class recompute, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)

inverse_roundtrip.verdict_verbatim:
verify --expr rel_p_from_kinetic(5.3139)=100.0
  calc   = 100  ≈ expected 100.0  (|Δ|=7.38964e-13 ≤ ε=1e-9)
  tier   = 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (hexa-native libm-class recompute, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)

non_relativistic_limit.physics: The relativistic formula pc=sqrt(T^2+2*T*m) reduces to the non-rel sqrt(2*m*T) when T<<m_p c^2: the dropped T^2 term is ~T/(2m)~5e-5 of 2mT at T=100 keV. Agreement to ~5 significant figures CONFIRMS the reduction.
non_relativistic_limit.verdict_verbatim:
verify --expr rel_p_from_kinetic(0.1)=13.6987
  calc   = 13.6991  ≠ expected 13.6987  (|Δ|=0.000364993 > ε=1e-9)
  tier   = 🔴 FALSIFIED  (calc deterministically disagrees beyond ε — TECS-L result-agnostic closed negative)
non_relativistic_limit.interpretation: At the machine-precision gate ε=1e-9 the exact relativistic value is NOT bit-identical to the non-rel approximation (the T^2 term is nonzero), so the strict probe is 🔴 — this is the EXPECTED honest result. The physical reduction holds at ~5-sig-fig level (Δ=3.6e-4 MeV/c).

negative_control.verdict_verbatim:
verify --expr rel_kinetic_from_p(3500.0)=2700.0
  calc   = 2685.31  ≠ expected 2700.0  (|Δ|=14.6889 > ε=1e-9)
  tier   = 🔴 FALSIFIED  (calc deterministically disagrees beyond ε — TECS-L result-agnostic closed negative)
negative_control.purpose: Confirms the verifier rejects a wrong claim (anti-tautology) — the 🟢 verdicts are discriminating, not vacuous.

atlas_register.result: absorb = → atlas/inbox/verified_equations.tape (@D verified_rel_kinetic_from_p_3500_0__2685_31, g7 inbox; 🟢 inbox-fold, not committed — shared sibling artifact)

tier_summary: 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL ×4 (3 ladder rungs + inverse roundtrip) · 🔴 FALSIFIED ×2 (negative control + strict non-rel-limit probe — both EXPECTED). All verdicts hexa-native (mini, POOL_DISABLE=1); no LLM self-judgement.
governance: @D g5 (verify via hexa CLI, verdict verbatim)
@D d9 (commit only explicit files, no sibling sweep)
